'''Dorzo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who served as [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]]'s [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]]. It was he who greeted [[Han Solo/Legends|Vykk Draygo]] (the alias of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] while employed on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]) and [[Jalus Nebl]] when they arrived at Jiliac's palace on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], carrying a message and gift from [[Zavval]]. He was apparently still employed as Jiliac's lieutenant at the time of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord's]] death in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
